all.en: The Mid-Autumn Festival is one of my favorite holidays of the year.
all.zh: 中秋節是我一年中最喜歡的節日之一。

all.en: Our family always gathers on the rooftop to enjoy a barbecue together.
all.zh: 我們家總是聚在頂樓一起烤肉。

all.en: My father went to three different bakeries to find the best mooncakes.
all.zh: 爸爸跑了三家不同的糕餅店，只為了買到最棒的月餅。

all.en: He chose traditional ones with salted egg yolks and a few modern flavors.
all.zh: 他挑了傳統的蛋黃口味，也買了一些新潮的口味。

all.en: My mother marinated chicken wings, beef, and corn the night before.
all.zh: 媽媽前一晚就先醃好了雞翅、牛肉和玉米。

all.en: My younger brother set up the grill and started the charcoal carefully.
all.zh: 弟弟負責架烤爐，並小心地點燃木炭。

all.en: Smoke quickly rose into the cool evening air, and our neighbors waved hello.
all.zh: 煙很快升上涼爽的夜空，鄰居們也揮手打招呼。

all.en: While we ate, we admired how round and bright the full moon looked.
all.zh: 我們一邊吃，一邊欣賞又圓又亮的滿月。

all.en: My grandmother told us the old legend of Chang'e once again.
all.zh: 奶奶又一次為我們講起嫦娥的古老傳說。

all.en: Afterwards, we cut the mooncakes into small pieces and shared them slowly.
all.zh: 之後，我們把月餅切成小塊，慢慢分著吃。

all.en: That night I went to sleep feeling full, warm, and very loved.
all.zh: 那晚我帶著滿足、溫暖和滿滿的愛入睡。

all.en: The next morning, I woke up to find leftover mooncakes on the kitchen counter.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我醒來發現廚房檯面上還有吃剩的月餅。

all.en: My mother packed several boxes to give to our neighbors as a small gesture.
all.zh: 媽媽包了好幾盒，作為小小的心意分送給鄰居。

all.en: I delivered one box to the elderly couple who lived on the floor below us.
all.zh: 我送了一盒給住在我們樓下那對老夫婦。

all.en: They invited me in for tea and showed me old photos of their family festivals.
all.zh: 他們邀我進屋喝茶，並給我看他們家過節的老照片。

all.en: That afternoon, my cousins came over to play traditional pomelo hats with the kids.
all.zh: 那天下午，表哥表姐過來陪小孩子玩戴柚子皮帽的傳統遊戲。

all.en: We watched a documentary together about how mooncakes are made in different regions.
all.zh: 我們一起看了一部紀錄片，介紹不同地區月餅的製作方式。

all.en: My grandmother taught my niece how to make a simple lantern from red paper.
all.zh: 奶奶教我姪女用紅紙做一個簡單的燈籠。

all.en: In the evening, we walked through the park where children carried glowing lanterns.
all.zh: 傍晚，我們漫步在公園裡，看著孩子們提著發亮的燈籠。

all.en: My father said this year's gathering had been the most peaceful one in years.
all.zh: 爸爸說今年的聚會是這幾年來最祥和的一次。

all.en: I drifted to sleep thinking about how traditions truly hold families closely together.
all.zh: 我帶著傳統真能將家人緊密相連的想法，慢慢進入夢鄉。
